summary: Save a custom template as regular template
description: Save a custom template as regular template. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/open_question_templates/save_as_template. Required parameters: title, offer_template_id, company_id. Optional parameters include category.

params.name: title
params.description: Name of the newly created template

params.name: category
params.description: Category of the newly created template
